content.en:
"Don't be polite to me! For me, this stone tablet is far less precious than the heart of the Heavenly Forbidden Tree!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said sincerely.

After all, she had already comprehended this piece of forbidden stone tablet, even if she had been reincarnated, but the forbidden dao contained on it, the perception was still engraved in her mind.

Therefore, she can slowly realize it in the future, and she does not need this stone tablet fragment.

And the Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart is different, if there is no Heavenly Forbidden Tree Heart, she will not be able to break through to the Supreme True Ancestor realm at all, even if he is the reincarnation of a half-step domain ancestor, it will not work.

Therefore, Ye Tian helped her too much.

Ouyang Jiu'er put away all the other treasures, and then opened the other treasures of this palace one by one and took the resources inside.

She was originally the resources and treasures she had prepared for herself, and Ye Tian naturally would not ask for them.

Soon, the two left the palace.

Before leaving, Ouyang Jiu'er shared a part of the control of this world fragment to Ye Tian, and if Ye Tian lacked the special blood here in the future, he could come here to get it.

Anyway, the creatures on the fragment of this world have no threat to Ye Tian, and they can come and hunt the creatures here at any time.

......

Returning to the Terrans, Ye Tian began to study the fragment of the forbidden stone tablet.

Forbidden space.

Ye Tian came here to retreat, and opened up a special area here to build his own retreat.

The fragments of the taboo stele were placed here, and Ye Tian concentrated on contemplating the taboo dao above.

This was also the first time Ye Tian had been involved in the Forbidden Dao, and as soon as he realized it, he felt the power of the Forbidden Dao, and just a wisp of the breath of the Forbidden Dao was far superior to the Forbidden Dao.

The two sides are not at all the same level of Tao!

"No wonder Ouyang Jiu'er asked me to give up the Supreme Powerful Dao, and the others participated in the Supreme Powerful Dao for the sake of combat power, and the second was to forcibly break into the realm of the Supreme Dao Ancestor. But I can easily enter the Supreme Dao Ancestor in the future, and the power of the Forbidden Dao is far greater than the Supreme Dao. "

Ye Tian muttered.

It can be said that from any point of view, he should go to the forbidden path instead of wasting time on the supreme path.

Moreover, there are too many supreme and powerful paths, and he is walking on the endless avenue, if it is a door to enlightenment, don't even think about mastering the supreme endless path for hundreds of millions of years.

The forbidden path is different, although it is also divided into many kinds, but the forbidden path is a whole, a whole that can be perfectly linked.

It's just that the forbidden path is too difficult to comprehend, so people split it and choose to comprehend it one by one.

And for those people, each one is a taboo text, a taboo path that belongs to them.

Ye Tian could also comprehend the forbidden path one by one at the beginning, and when he reached a certain opportunity, he would comprehend it as a whole, and then merge with the endless avenue, thus turning into his endless forbidden path.

In the following days, Ye Tian began to comprehend every taboo text, from ignorance at the beginning, to gradually have some understanding.

Ye Tian also found that the comprehension of the Forbidden Dao was of great benefit to him in controlling the power of the Dark Taboo.

Previously, although he controlled the power of the dark taboo, he did not study it deeply, and the application of the power of the dark forbidden was also in a state of skin.

And the power of the Dark Forbidden is a completely new source power, and it is too much to study and scrutinize.

It's a pity that people have studied too little on the power of the dark taboo, and even the strongest Dao Ancestor has only initially controlled the power of the dark taboo, and others even have a luxury hope for contact, so naturally there will be no systematic cultivation system of the power of the dark taboo.

Comprehending the Forbidden Dao was not helpful for Ye Tian for a short time, but it would have too much impact on the future.

Moreover, once he truly comprehended the Endless Forbidden Dao, his strength would still usher in a terrifying surge.

Time passed, and there was a new change in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm almost every few years.

New forces are constantly being born, and old ones are ending.

With the help of the forbidden space, the strength of the Nine Extremes Legion is skyrocketing, and the strength of the human race is also improving rapidly.

this day.

A big thing happened, a forbidden treasure land was born in the God of War True Country, and it is not the most ordinary kind of forbidden treasure land, although it is not as good as the forbidden ancient well, but it is second.

The point is that this forbidden treasure land is a mountain range, and in the mountain range, there are creatures containing forbidden bloodlines, these creatures are not taboo creatures, but their cultivation value with forbidden bloodlines is too high.

Whether these forbidden bloodline creatures are used to cultivate into mounts, or for research, or to refine elixirs, their value is very high.

In addition, some forces can even transfer the forbidden bloodline to the strong with a certain degree of certainty, and can retain a trace of the forbidden bloodline.

In the future, these powerhouses with a trace of forbidden bloodline will be able to be promoted to the strongest Dao Ancestor with greater certainty.

So, the value of this forbidden mountain range is too great!

----------------

Chaos, the Temple of the Gods.

A group of Dao Ancestors led by the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor started a meeting here to discuss the matter of the Forbidden Mountain Range.

"I'm afraid the news will be difficult to block, or it won't be long before those True Ancestors of the Upper Triple Heaven Force and the Middle Triple Heaven Force will enter the God of War True Kingdom, and the God of War True Kingdom can't stop it at all, and even all the True Kingdoms under the command of our God Temple may not be able to stop it!" said a Dao Ancestor.

"Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, what can you do, the God of War True Kingdom is my foundation!" said the tower master of the God of War Tower, Ling Zhan Dao Ancestor.

"Spirit Battle Dao Ancestor, I am in chaos, and there is no way to enter the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and there are so many Dao Ancestors in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, they can be forcibly born, any six or seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors can beat me!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was also helpless.

In the past so long, although his strength was much stronger than when he was just promoted to the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and with the help of many opportunities in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, he is now a top-level Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, but it is far inferior to the Sixth or Seventh Heavenly Dao Ancestor, let alone comparable to the Eightfold Heavenly Supreme Dao Ancestor.

"Then what about your Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor of the Void Heaven One Lineage, he is the First True Ancestor of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, he should be able to block the True Ancestor of other forces, right?"

Spirit Battle Dao Ancestor hurriedly said.

"My disciple is only one person, how can I stop so many invincible true ancestors? Moreover, once the Dao Ancestor is forcibly born, my disciple is not an opponent! According to my plan, let the true ancestors of the God of War True Kingdom withdraw first, after all, they are fighting for the Forbidden Mountain Range, even if the God of War True Kingdom is shattered, there will be little loss if people don't die!"

"Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, how many people can be evacuated if we withdraw now? Wouldn't the countless people of our God of War True Kingdom be finished?"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor pondered for a while and said, "That's it, let's evacuate some of the people as much as possible first, but I'll go find my disciple and see if he can keep the Void Heaven True Country." In addition, our True Ancestor should also try to enter the Forbidden Mountain Range as much as possible, and take as many treasures as he can, after all, the more forbidden treasures we have, the stronger our strength will be!"

"That's all there is to it!"

Spirit Battle Dao Ancestor nodded.

Immediately, the people of the God of War True Kingdom mobilized, and countless people began to flee from the God of War True Kingdom.

At the same time, the birth of the Forbidden Mountain Range in the God of War True Country leaked out.

But at this time, many True Ancestors of the God of War True Kingdom were crazy looking for treasures in the Forbidden Mountain Range, and as long as they found a treasure, they would immediately evacuate, and they must not delay time, nor be too greedy.

Void and innocent country.

Ye Tian was in retreat, and when he heard about the God of War True Kingdom, he was also out of the customs.

And at this time, the incarnation of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor just came.

"Master!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor didn't see Ye Tian's strength, thinking that Ye Tian was still an invincible True Ancestor.

"Apprentice, as a teacher, I hope that you can help the God of War True Kingdom this time, and also help us with the Void Heaven Pulse and the Temple of the Gods. "Void Heaven Dao Ancestral Dao.

"Master, is it for me to block those forces?" Ye Tian frowned, "My strength can't stop those forces!"

"No, I just hope that you can contain those forces a little bit, and try your best to keep the God of War True Kingdom! The God of War True Kingdom is one of the top true kingdoms of the Temple of the Gods, and it sends countless geniuses to the Temple of the Gods every year, once the True Kingdom of the God of War is destroyed, the Temple of the Gods will suffer heavy losses! This time the Forbidden Mountain Range was born, so many strong people fought each other, and the God of War True Kingdom was probably destroyed! If you can, can you block the Forbidden Mountain Range first?"

Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said.

"This estimate is difficult, other forces will not follow my arrangement, and maybe there will be a Dao Ancestor coming, so I can only guarantee to delay as much time as possible!"

Ye Tian thought for a while and said.

Ye Tiandu said this, and the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor had nothing to say.

Subsequently, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor asked Ye Tian to be careful, and left the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

Ye Tian couldn't help but sigh when he saw the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor leaving: "Master Venerable is completely dragged down by the Temple of the Gods! There are so many forces in the Temple of the Gods, how can they be protected one by one in the future?"

However, since he agreed, he tried his best to keep the true kingdom of the god of war.

Don't dare to say anything else, he can still delay some time and let most of the creatures of the God of War True Kingdom evacuate.
